Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jdbc.repository.query
Query derivation mechanism for JDBC specific repositories.
org.springframework.data.relational.core.query
Query and update support.
org.springframework.data.relational.repository.query
Query support for relational database repositories.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Criteria
    Criteria.and(List<? extends CriteriaDefinition> criteria)
    Create a new Criteria and combine it as group with AND using the provided Criteria group.
    Criteria
    Criteria.and(CriteriaDefinition criteria)
    Create a new Criteria and combine it as group with AND using the provided Criteria group.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.between(Object begin, Object end)
    Creates a Criteria using between (BETWEEN begin AND end).
    static Criteria
    Criteria.empty()
    Static factory method to create an empty Criteria.
    static Criteria
    Criteria.from(List<Criteria> criteria)
    Create a new Criteria and combine it as group with AND using the provided Criterias.
    static Criteria
    Criteria.from(Criteria... criteria)
    Create a new Criteria and combine it as group with AND using the provided Criterias.
    @Nullable Criteria
    Criteria.getPrevious()
     
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.greaterThan(Object value)
    Creates a Criteria using greater-than(>).
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.greaterThanOrEquals(Object value)
    Creates a Criteria using greater-than or equal to (>=).
    Criteria
    Criteria.ignoreCase(boolean ignoreCase)
    Creates a new Criteria with the given "ignore case" flag.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.in(Object... values)
    Creates a Criteria using IN.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.in(Collection<?> values)
    Creates a Criteria using IN.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.is(Object value)
    Creates a Criteria using equality.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.isFalse()
    Creates a Criteria using IS FALSE.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.isNotNull()
    Creates a Criteria using IS NOT NULL.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.isNull()
    Creates a Criteria using IS NULL.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.isTrue()
    Creates a Criteria using IS TRUE.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.lessThan(Object value)
    Creates a Criteria using less-than (<).
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.lessThanOrEquals(Object value)
    Creates a Criteria using less-than or equal to (<=).
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.like(Object value)
    Creates a Criteria using LIKE.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.not(Object value)
    Creates a Criteria using equality (is not).
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.notBetween(Object begin, Object end)
    Creates a Criteria using not between (NOT BETWEEN begin AND end).
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.notIn(Object... values)
    Creates a Criteria using NOT IN.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.notIn(Collection<?> values)
    Creates a Criteria using NOT IN.
    Criteria
    Criteria.CriteriaStep.notLike(Object value)
    Creates a Criteria using NOT LIKE.
    Criteria
    Criteria.or(List<? extends CriteriaDefinition> criteria)
    Create a new Criteria and combine it as group with OR using the provided Criteria group.
    Criteria
    Criteria.or(CriteriaDefinition criteria)
    Create a new Criteria and combine it as group with OR using the provided Criteria group.

    Description

    Creates Criteria for the given method name part.

    RelationalQueryCreator.or(Criteria base, Criteria criteria)
    Combines two Criterias using OR.
